titles.en: The meaning of the report that has narrated that from an individual’s happiness is the lightness of his two opposites
The meaning of the report that has narrated that from an individual’s happiness is the lightness of his two opposites

segments: : حدثنا محمد بن يحيى، قال: حدثنا محمد بن أحمد بن يحيى الأشعري، قال: حدثنا علي بن إبراهيم المنقري - أو غيره - رفعه، قال: قال الصادق عليه السلام: إن من سعادة المرء خفة عارضيه. قال: وما في هذا من السعادة إنما السعادة خفة ماضغيه بالتسبيح .
arabic.text: : حدثنا محمد بن يحيى، قال: حدثنا محمد بن أحمد بن يحيى الأشعري، قال: حدثنا علي بن إبراهيم المنقري - أو غيره - رفعه، قال: قال الصادق عليه السلام: إن من سعادة المرء خفة عارضيه. قال: وما في هذا من السعادة إنما السعادة خفة ماضغيه بالتسبيح .

segments: 1.	My father, may Allah grant him mercy, said: We were told by Muhammed bin Yahya, that he said: We were told by Muhammed bin Ahmad bin Yahya al-Ash’ari, that he said: We were told by Ali bin Ibrahim al-Manqari, or another, who ascribed it, saying: Al-Sadiq, peace be upon him, said: Indeed, from an individual’s happiness is the lightness of his two opposites. He said: There is no happiness in this. The happiness is only in the lightness of his two chewers by (which he can perform) glorification (of Allah).
en.basel-kadem.text: 1.	My father, may Allah grant him mercy, said: We were told by Muhammed bin Yahya, that he said: We were told by Muhammed bin Ahmad bin Yahya al-Ash’ari, that he said: We were told by Ali bin Ibrahim al-Manqari, or another, who ascribed it, saying: Al-Sadiq, peace be upon him, said: Indeed, from an individual’s happiness is the lightness of his two opposites. He said: There is no happiness in this. The happiness is only in the lightness of his two chewers by (which he can perform) glorification (of Allah).
